query:
UPDATE game_monster_catalog SET wuxing = CASE 
  WHEN wuxing = 'wood' THEN '木'
  WHEN wuxing = 'fire' THEN '火'
  WHEN wuxing = 'earth' THEN '土'
  WHEN wuxing = 'metal' THEN '金'
  WHEN wuxing = 'water' THEN '水'
  ELSE wuxing
END WHERE wuxing IN ('wood', 'fire', 'earth', 'metal', 'water');

  WHEN wuxing = 'earth' THEN '土'
  WHEN wuxing = 'metal' THEN '金'
  WHEN wuxing = 'water' THEN '水'
